title: CBSE to use school exam marks for Class XII board scores in Gulf nations? Dept frames alt scheme after exams cancelled
content:
CBSE is reportedly considering using school exam marks for Class XII board scores.
*   This alternative evaluation scheme is being framed specifically for students in Gulf nations.
*   The move comes after the cancellation of Class XII board exams in those regions.

title: United States only confident that about one-third of Iran’s missile arsenal, drones have been destroyed so far
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The United States assesses that only about one-third of Iran's missile arsenal and drones have been destroyed.
*   This indicates a significant majority of Iran's missile and drone capabilities remain intact.
*   U.S. confidence is limited to this proportion of destruction achieved "so far."

title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
content:
The Supreme Court has expressed concern over ongoing violations of the law.
*   These breaches specifically relate to the disclosure of sexual assault survivors' identities.
*   The Court highlighted the repeated nature of these violations, indicating a persistent problem.

title: People spreading rumours on lockdown will be booked: CM Fadnavis
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   CM Fadnavis warned against the spread of rumours.
*   The warning specifically targets misinformation related to the ongoing lockdown.
*   Individuals found spreading such rumours will face legal action and be booked by authorities.
